rulings.Case Title: ALTHEMUS COLEMAN VS. 250 KEARNY STREET, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dissolve Prelim Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 18, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANT 250 KEARNY STREET, LLC, CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT, LLC's Motion To Dissolve Preliminary Injunction. Deny 1) Issues presented were created by defendants; therefore, interest of justice relief not appropriate. 2) Per Walberg notice not mandatory where object of notice was accomplished. 3) CCP 1008 not met. (501/REQ)
